name: Dynavap The Thermal Hyper Cap
summary: Step up your DynaVap game with the Thermal Hyper Cap (THC) —a groundbreaking innovation in ball vape technology.
description: Step up your DynaVap game with the Thermal Hyper Cap (THC) —a groundbreaking innovation in ball vape technology. Engineered from premium titanium, this cap features a core packed with 2mm Green Sapphire Balls, ensuring optimal heat retention and a next-level convection vaping experience. Unlike traditional conduction heating, which relies on direct contact, the THC uses convection heating to circulate hot air evenly over your herbs. This advanced design preserves flavours, maximises efficiency, and reduces combustion risks—giving users a cleaner, more flavorful session every time. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
